hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TMUX_WIN=$(tmux display-message -p '#S:#I' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-tmux'); echo "[$(date)] [tmux:$TMUX_WIN] Notification hook — matcher: permission_prompt|idle_prompt|elicitation_dialog — type: $(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.notification_type // "unknown"')" >> ~/.claude/hook-log.txt; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

INPUT=$(cat); TMUX_WIN=$(tmux display-message -p '#S:#I' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-tmux'); echo "[$(date)] [tmux:$TMUX_WIN] Stop hook — data: $(echo "$INPUT" | jq -c '.')" >> ~/.claude/hook-log.txt; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Funk.aiff
